name: growthlint
description: The ESLint for growth marketing. Scan websites and repos for conversion leaks, missing analytics, broken attribution, and SEO issues.
author: GrowthLint Contributors

skills.name: compare-sites

skills.name: check-integrations

skills.name: find-dead-links
